text:
Comment on attachment 199590
Update math/reduce-psl to version 20181123

 COMMENT=	REDUCE Portable Standard Lisp general-purpose algebra system
Should not start/contain portname

+SFSUBDIR=	snapshot_2018-11-23
Should be below USES with a space in between.
